tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web via SearXNG for current information, news, prices, documentation, or anything the model might hallucinate.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and extract the readable text content from a specific URL.

tools.name: file_read
tools.description: Read the contents of a local file.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file

tools.name: file_write
tools.description: Write or create a local file with the given content.

path.description: Path where the file should be written

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite an existing file (default: true)

tools.name: shell_exec
tools.description: Execute an allowed shell command and return stdout/stderr. Allowed: ls, cat, grep, find, wc, head, tail, git, python3, pwd.

tools.name: image_describe
tools.description: Send an image to the vision-capable general model for analysis and description.

path.description: Path to the image file, or base64-encoded image data

prompt.description: What to ask about the image
